series_metadata.series_description: The Check Balancing Logs are completed for each check run. The Check Balancing Logs contain the number of checks used; the number range of the checks, the dollar value of checks printed, balances, etc. The Check Balancing Logs are completed by computer operators and are signed off by the shift supervisor.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 2 years provided until audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released, all discrepancies are resolved, and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for 2 years in the Operations I: Drive folder, provided until audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released, all discrepancies are resolved, and then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
